noveltyJustification: First evidence iteration for this lineage; it confirms the layout and sharpens the runtime skill-demotion constraint.
keyQuestions: Is the proposed system-deep-loop/runtime layout structurally coherent without duplicate skill identity or mode ambiguity?
answeredQuestions: Is the proposed system-deep-loop/runtime layout structurally coherent without duplicate skill identity or mode ambiguity?

ruledOut.approach: Flatten workflow packets and runtime libraries into one directory
ruledOut.reason: Hub contract requires per-mode contracts to remain unflattened.

ruledOut.approach: Keep runtime as a discoverable skill after merge
ruledOut.reason: Runtime is consumed by workflows and is not user-facing.
